div.head: Mr. Mizner to Mr. Blaine.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States in Central America,
Via El Paso, Tex., September 3, 1890.

div.p: Mr. Mizner reports the withdrawal of both armies from the frontiers and their rapid disbandment, the success of the officious mediation of the diplomatic corps, and the approval with which the country regards the course of that body. He adds that the intention is to declare peace the coming week.
